items.name: address-display
items.title: Address Display
items.description: Displays an EVM wallet address with copy-to-clipboard and an optional block explorer link.

items.name: address-identity
items.title: Address Identity
items.description: Resolves an EVM address to an ENS or Base name with optional avatar, copy-to-clipboard, and explorer link.

items.name: token-logo
items.title: Token Logo
items.description: Displays a token image with resilient symbol, name, or address fallback.

items.name: token-stack
items.title: Token Stack
items.description: Displays overlapping token logos for baskets, pools, routes, and portfolio rows.

items.name: token-price
items.title: Token Price
items.description: Formats token prices with optional positive, negative, or neutral change.

items.name: network-logo
items.title: Network Logo
items.description: Displays a network or chain logo with known chain fallbacks.

items.name: token-balance
items.title: Token Balance
items.description: Displays a token amount with optional logo, fiat value, and change.

items.name: asset-row
items.title: Asset Row
items.description: Displays a practical portfolio or watchlist row from token identity, network, amount, value, and change.
